mapper.sql: SELECT field_id, category_id, field_key, field_name, field_type, required_flag, default_value, max_length, min_number, max_number, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM ticket_custom_field_definition
mapper.select: WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY sort_order, field_id
WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = '0' ORDER BY sort_order, field_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_custom_field_definition (category_id, field_key, field_name, field_type, required_flag, default_value, max_length, min_number, max_number, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{fieldKey}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldType}, #{requiredFlag}, #{defaultValue}, #{maxLength}, #{minNumber}, #{maxNumber}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_custom_field_definition SET field_name=#{fieldName}, required_flag=#{requiredFlag}, default_value=#{defaultValue}, max_length=#{maxLength}, min_number=#{minNumber}, max_number=#{maxNumber}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=#{updateTime}, remark=#{remark} WHERE field_id=#{fieldId}
